strengths: Clear identification of three distinct, specific real-world objects (heirloom recipe book, IB Physics HL textbook, self-photographed iPad âBooksâ app icon) with contextual grounding
Explicit, well-explained links between each object and the chosen IA prompt, drawing on TOK concepts (perspective, methods & tools, authority, bias)
Substantive, evidence-backed justifications for the inclusion of each object, including concrete examples (e.g., changes to the IB syllabus, Library of Alexandria analogy)
Frequent, explicit references to the IA prompt showing sustained engagement with the notion of âimprovementâ in knowledge
Use of personal photographs and authentic artifacts to strengthen the real-world connection and demonstrate originality
weaknesses: Occasional repetition of points and some awkward phrasing reduce clarity and precision in places
Incomplete or inconsistent citation formatting (missing authors, dates, duplicate entries) detracts from academic rigor
Some analyses end abruptly or mid-thought, leaving ideas (e.g., digital format benefits, cognitive bias) underdeveloped
Counter-claims (limitations of e-books, authenticity concerns) are only partially explored
Conclusion largely restates earlier arguments rather than offering an integrative synthesis tying all objects and TOK implications together
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition meets nearly all descriptors for the top band: it clearly identifies three well-contextualized objects, provides strong, evidence-supported links to the IA prompt, and applies TOK terminology with depth. The studentâs authentic photographs and concrete examples reinforce the real-world focus, and justifications for each object are sustained and relevant. Minor lapsesâincluding occasional repetition, incomplete citations, some underdeveloped analyses and a conclusion that reiterates rather than synthesizesâprevent a perfect score but do not undermine the overall mastery displayed. A score of 9 accurately reflects the high quality of the exhibition while acknowledging these small areas for improvement.

annotations.comment: The photograph of the actual heirloom recipe book adds authenticity and grounds the discussion in a concrete, specific real-world object.
Identifying the âRedwood Inkâ resource on word-count reduction shows attention to the writing process, reflecting good scholarly practice.
The final citation lacks uniform title formatting. Ensure every entry follows the same style guidelines for clarity and consistency.
The discussion links the new IB Physics HL textbook to methods, tools, responsibility and certainty, demonstrating strong use of TOK terminology and conceptual depth.
Including a current edition cover grounds the object in a specific real-world context and illustrates the evolution of curricular knowledge.
The source citation âFrom âIB Sourceââ lacks author, publisher and date details. Provide a complete bibliographic reference for academic rigor.
The claim that textbooks reflect âlatest research findingsâ would be stronger with a specific example or citation of an updated theory or study in physics.
While the object is well described, this caption misses an explicit reference back to the prompt on improvement. Restate the prompt link here to reinforce cohesion.
The assertion that practice exam questions âdemonstrate superiorityâ needs supporting evidenceâquote or reference specific questions to substantiate this claim.
The transition into the âBooksâ app section is repetitive. Vary phrasing and tighten narrative flow to maintain reader engagement.
The studentâs own photograph of the iPad app icon provides authenticity and personal engagement, strengthening the real-world connection.
Labeling this as an âown photoâ highlights the original nature of the object and solidifies its place in the exhibition.
The paragraph ends mid-sentence (âmeaning the knowledge itself hasâ¦â). Complete the analysis of how the digital format constitutes an improvement.
The section discusses accessibility benefits but lacks data or scholarly references on digital note-taking. Integrate research to substantiate these claims.
Linking the e-book to Methods and Tools and drawing on the Library of Alexandria analogy shows sophisticated TOK thinking and depth of analysis.
The historical analogy of the Library of Alexandria versus digital preservation powerfully illustrates the irreversible loss of past knowledge.
The limitation of e-books is mentioned only briefly. Expand the counterclaim with more detailed consideration of authenticity and digital dependency.
The conclusion restates earlier points rather than offering integrative insight. Consider adding a synthesis that ties together all objects and their TOK implications.
Including a separate âWorks Consultedâ section demonstrates intellectual curiosity and shows engagement with a wide range of sources beyond direct citations.
The Grade Pod URL citation lacks author and publication date. Adopt a consistent citation style with full bibliographic details.
Citation formats vary across entries. Standardize formatting (e.g., italics for titles, consistent access dates) to enhance professionalism.
Some consulted sources are informal blogs. Prioritize peer-reviewed or academic publications to strengthen the exhibitionâs credibility.
The TOK 2022 source is cited twice on this page. Consolidate duplicate references to avoid redundancy.
No explicit reference is made to Ways of Knowing. Incorporate WOK terminology (e.g., language, memory) to deepen the TOK analysis.
The student restates Prompt 13 verbatim at the outset, establishing a clear focus and ensuring the reader understands the TOK question being addressed.
The caption clearly identifies the provenance and modification history of the recipe book, reinforcing its real-world context and relevance to the prompt.
The paragraph ends abruptly mid-thought, leaving key ideas about cognitive bias and objectivity underdeveloped. Complete the reasoning to strengthen the argumentâs coherence.
This passage revisits points on bias and subjectivity already made. Consider condensing repetitive sections to maintain focus and improve the exhibitionâs conciseness.
This section effectively links the family recipe book to perspectival bias, showing an awareness of how personal experience influences judgments of âimprovement,â a key TOK concept.

rubricCriterionStrandBandContents.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA
prompt are made, but
these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not
clear what the student is
trying to convey.
There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists
only of unsupported
assertions.

The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
